name: 49er Christmas Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix salt, sugar, milk, eggs, melted butter, currants, and spices with the starter culture thoroughly.
2. Gradually add flour, a cup at a time, until too stiff to mix by hand.
3. Turn dough onto a floured board and knead in any remaining flour.
4. Divide dough into two portions for two loaves.
5. Place loaves in greased loaf pans and allow them to rise 1½ to 3 hours, or until the dough rises about 1-2 inches above the edge of the pan.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 55 to 60 minutes.
7. Cool on racks.
